note: Cards mirror mvp-factory-control issues #692–#724 (foundation spine). State is last synced from GitHub API; reopen board for live workflow.

releases.title: Source-of-truth contradiction audit
releases.summary: Maps contradictions between docs, config, scripts, and runtime so work starts from verified truth.
releases.details: Foundation audit artifact with severity-ranked contradiction IDs and remediation order.
manual: Open foundation-contradiction-audit.md (or current audit doc).
Triage by severity; fix highest-impact drift first.
Re-run readiness / CI after doc or config changes.

releases.title: Unified readiness gate
releases.summary: Single PASS/FAIL command combining config checks, runtime probes, and doctor-style signals.
releases.details: scripts/oc-readiness and npm run readiness give operators one go/no-go.
manual: Run npm run readiness.
On FAIL, fix listed critical items and rerun until PASS.

releases.title: Miniapp contract v1
releases.summary: Canonical schema and governance for every new function / miniapp.
releases.details: miniapp-contract-v1.md defines the one shape for delivery and review.
manual: Read miniapp-contract-v1.md before authoring a miniapp.
Update functions/registry.v1.json with matching metadata.
Run npm run registry:validate.

releases.title: Function registry + validator
releases.summary: Machine-readable registry with automated schema validation.
manual: Add or edit registry entries.
Run npm run registry:validate.
Fix validation errors before merge.

releases.title: Dashboard runtime modularization (phase 1)
releases.summary: Extract runtime helpers from the server monolith for safer iteration.
releases.details: dashboard/lib/runtime.mjs hosts runScript, launchDetached, readJson patterns.
manual: Prefer dashboard/lib/runtime.mjs for subprocess helpers.
Keep route handlers thin; smoke-test dashboard actions after refactors.

releases.title: Issue quality standard + Ready gate
releases.summary: Templates and checklist so board items are implementation-ready.
manual: Draft issues with required sections.
Apply ready-gate before moving to Ready (NEXT).
Attach evidence when entering Review.

releases.title: Migrate functions to Miniapp Contract v1
releases.summary: Bring URL summary, daily briefing, and model-routing preview under the v1 contract.
releases.details: Aligns legacy surfaces with registry + validator + governance.
manual: Inventory non-contract functions.
Cut over to registry entries and stable API paths.
Validate with npm run registry:validate and manual smoke tests.

releases.title: Channel adapter interface + lifecycle
releases.summary: Shared package for ingress, policy, dispatch, egress, and delivery visibility.
manual: Normalize events to the canonical adapter shape.
Enforce lifecycle stages without silent skips.
Emit explicit delivery states.

releases.title: API reference adapter implementation
releases.summary: Reference HTTP adapter exercising policy, audit, and telemetry hooks.
manual: Open /700/API_channel_adapter and exercise the adapter.
POST /api/functions/api-channel-adapter with channel, taskType, costTarget.
Confirm blocked vs allowed paths in JSON responses.

releases.title: WhatsApp adapter parity
releases.summary: Harden WhatsApp against the shared adapter contract.
manual: Run npm run adapter:whatsapp:validate after config edits.
Resolve parity mismatches before release.

releases.title: iMessage adapter architecture
releases.summary: Phased plan for iMessage provider boundaries and lifecycle.
manual: Follow phases A–D with exit-gate evidence.
Validate lifecycle parity against the contract.

releases.title: Email adapter architecture
releases.summary: Provider strategy and canonical email event mapping.
manual: Pick provider using documented criteria.
Implement normalize / send / status abstractions.

releases.title: Discord adapter architecture
releases.summary: Transport model for gateway events, interactions, and outbound delivery.
manual: Implement ingest / send / ack with retries and idempotency.

releases.title: Sovereign role taxonomy
releases.summary: Authority matrix for planning, implementation, review, test, and release.
manual: Assign work within role boundaries.
Use mandatory handoff fields; escalate vetoes to OC.

releases.title: Handoff schema + stage gates
releases.summary: Structured, validatable handoffs between roles.
manual: Author handoff JSON from schema.
Run npm run handoff:validate -- <artifact>.

releases.title: Automated release gates
releases.summary: DoD mapped to machine-checkable release artifacts.
manual: Prepare release gate JSON.
Run npm run release:gates -- <artifact>.

releases.title: External-channel policy engine
releases.summary: Risk-tier policy with approval gating and readable block reasons.
releases.details: Integrated with adapter flows; npm run policy:validate.
manual: Test high-risk paths without approval and confirm block reasons.

releases.title: Decision / action audit trail
releases.summary: Hash-chained append-only audit for policy, routing, and delivery.
manual: Exercise adapter paths that emit audit events.
Run npm run audit:validate; investigate chain breaks.

releases.title: Reliability telemetry baseline
releases.summary: SLO-oriented event schema and summary API.
manual: Run npm run telemetry:seed and telemetry:validate.
Inspect /api/telemetry/summary after traffic.

releases.title: Incident response + replay
releases.summary: Incident taxonomy, ownership, and deterministic replay protocol.
manual: Document severities and on-call ownership.
Define replay steps for gateway and channel failures.

releases.title: Public API (OpenAPI)
releases.summary: Versioned external API contract and error taxonomy.
manual: Publish OpenAPI spec; align dashboard routes with documented errors.

releases.title: External API auth + quotas
releases.summary: Scoped auth, rate limits, and tenant isolation for API consumers.
releases.details: Extends public API surface with multi-tenant safety.
manual: Define scopes and quota policies.
Enforce per-tenant isolation in handlers.

releases.title: Cross-channel SLA dashboard
releases.summary: Operator views for success rate, latency, and failures by channel.
manual: Wire channel dimensions into telemetry aggregates.
Ship dashboard views for trends and drill-down.

releases.title: Chaos drills
releases.summary: Gateway, channel, and provider outage drills with verification.
manual: Script failure modes; measure detection and recovery time.

releases.title: Data governance + retention
releases.summary: Retention and PII handling with auditable controls.
releases.details: Policy enforcement across logs, audit, and adapter payloads.
manual: Define retention classes; implement deletion and export hooks.

releases.title: Multi-tenant white-label foundation
releases.summary: Isolated branded operator workspaces.
manual: Design tenant boundary (data, auth, UI branding).
Prototype single-tenant hard isolation first.

releases.title: iMessage live bridge
releases.summary: Inbound-outbound iMessage loop with policy, audit, and telemetry.
manual: Run npm run imessage:validate.
POST sample inbound payload; verify lifecycle and delivery attempt.

releases.title: Five AI employees architecture
releases.summary: Named AI workers with handoffs instead of one overloaded assistant.
releases.details: Product-grade org model for MeiMei delivery.
manual: Read issue #723; align miniapps and Brain with employee lanes.

releases.title: What next? app
releases.summary: Context-aware daily guidance miniapp.
releases.details: Delivers prioritized “what to do” from Brain + sources.
manual: Track dashboard route /724 and registry entry for what-next.
